oom_predicate_form_a: Reason_s == ContainerTerminated AND Log_s contains 'exit code \'137\'' AND Log_s contains 'ProcessExited'
oom_predicate_form_b: Reason_s == ProcessExited AND Log_s contains 'exit code \'137\''

sub_gate_a_no_oom_records.section_6_bins_note: Section 6 has_any('memory') KQL filter produces false-positives for the healthy scenario; only the Strong path (section 5 record-scoped 2-form predicate) is authoritative for Gate 12.

sub_gate_c_stable_replicas.sidecar_first_running_state_substitutes_: Section 10c restart-count metric was empty for all 3 scenarios; runningState==RunningAtMaxScale + replicas>=1 is the functional equivalent because a restart-looping container could not maintain RunningAtMaxScale.
